biography.value: Local militia members called to defend their town or region. Part-time soldiers - farmers, craftsmen, merchants, and workers who train together regularly for local defense. More disciplined and organized than bandits but less professional than full-time soldiers. Loyal to their community and willing to defend it, though they may break and flee if facing overwhelming odds or supernatural threats. They know the local area well and can call for reinforcements from fellow militia or town guards.

system.tactics: Militia members use defensive tactics, forming shield walls with Defensive Stance when outnumbered. They use spears to maintain reach, keeping enemies at bay while supporting each other. Shield Master allows them to negate one devastating attack per fight - typically saved for critical moments. They fight in coordinated groups when possible, using their numbers and defensive training to overcome individual skill gaps. Against ranged attackers, they advance in formation, shields raised.
system.attacksNotes:
• Spear [Combat]: Melee attack (Agi 5 + Melee Combat 3), Reach: 5 ft
    • One-handed:
      • Margin 1: 6 damage
      • Margin 2: 10 damage (6 + 4 Str)
    • Two-handed (versatile):
      • Margin 1: 7 damage
      • Margin 2: 11 damage (7 + 4 Str)
system.reactionsNotes:
• Shield Block (from Buckler): Attacker must reroll one of their success dice. This is a [Free] action, usable once per round (no reaction cost).
  • Shield Master: Once per combat as a [Reaction], completely negate one attack that would hit you.
  • Force Reroll: [Reaction] once per round, Attacker must reroll one of their success dice
  • Increase DR: [Reaction] once per round, Gain +2 DR against this attack only

items.name: Spear, buckler, aketon armor, uniform, bedroll, high boots, common clothes
